narration: Gluconeogenesis is the process of generating glucose from non-carbohydrate sources.
visual_description: Context visual: Gluconeogenesis is the process of generating glucose from non-carbohydrate sources.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Gluconeogenesis is the process of generating glucose from non-carbohydrate sources.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Gluconeogenesis is the process of generating glucose from non-carbohydrate sources.

narration: It primarily occurs in the liver and helps maintain blood sugar levels during fasting.
visual_description: Escalation visual: It primarily occurs in the liver and helps maintain blood sugar levels during fasting.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: It primarily occurs in the liver and helps maintain blood sugar levels during fasting.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: It primarily occurs in the liver and helps maintain blood sugar levels during fasting.
